title: SMP Basics
description: A modpack that provides you with the basic mods you need for SMP, PVP and Content Creating.
body:
_Dedicated for SMP player, PVP players and SMP Content Creators._

In this modpack, you will find the perfect mods that improve your minecraft experience not only on SMPs but also in just regular minecraft too.

### Optimisation Mods :

This mods includes optimisation mods that can make your game run smoother (as well as improve your qualitity if you are recording/streaming).

### SMP-PVP Mods :

As well as optimisation mods, this modpack also includes mods such as :
- **BactroMod** : _allows you to tweak many useful features such as making water/lava clear when you are in them, make your shield shorter, make the player burning texture lower, etc._
- **TotemCounter** : _allows you to see how many totems your ennemy popped_
- **Crosshair Indicator** : _indicates when players are in your reach_
- **Simple Armor Hud** : _shows your armor durability in a minimal way_
- **Status Effect Timer** : _shows you for how long your potion effects have left till you have to repot_

These mods are popular and essential for SMP players, especially for players that play in PVP centered servers (ex. Infuse SMP, PvPLegacy, etc.).

### Content Creator Mods :

This modpack also includes Content Creating focused mods that can help creators boost their video making process. Some mods that can help content creators in their video making journey that can be found are :
- **Flash Back** : _allows you to take replay and cinematic shots_
- **Motion Capture** : _allows you to play multiple roles during a replay shot without needing extra people_
- **Carpet Mod** : _allows you to spawn in NPC in survival_
